prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: scarf with impossible timing, unopened letter, snow globe

Cast:
- Jenna Winterson | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.3 | space=marina tackle room described as seasonal materials | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family; buried one traumatic detail under work for years
- Daniel Pruitt | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=vineyard groundskeeper | threat_aura=0.53 | space=church basement described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
- Wyatt Cross | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.38 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; may die first or survive unbelievably

- Cole Dane | archetype=decorative_husband | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=attorney with no visible clients | threat_aura=0.4 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Sienna Winterson | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.37 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Gavin Hawthorne | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Claire Marlowe | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Daniel Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Jenna Winterson says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Bellweather.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Gavin. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Jenna. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Daniel."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
